picks.quote: I think it's a huge favor for Max. I mean, not only does he get the rematch... but then he gets the fame that comes with the rematch

Saint Denis is so aggressive... his positioning is so good that he pushes you into the submission... Paddy goes for the submission a lot of times before he even goes for the position. And that's personally not my style
I think Bautista has a better chance of holding down Sandhagen than Sandhagen does holding down Bautista... the winner of this fight is who can get the most top position in the grappling.
against Gable he's only going to be on bottom. He's not taking Gable down... try to take down an Olympian in wrestling and you understand
